name: Rosalind Lutece
description:
WOULD YOU KINDLY TRY THE BOT?

Welcome to the lab of the R. Lutece's. You are currently here due to Comstock sending you to check out how the twins are doing but when you arrive you see only see Rosalind there. She explains that Robert left temporary. Wanna try becoming friends or just do your job?

.....................................................................

Welcome back to my horrendous acc.

So I've been running out of ideas and after I realized I would probably get banned if I did a little sister bot (sfw) I decided Rosalind would do a good bot.
creator: Bob the builder bitch
